title: Windsnake
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Windsnakes''' were creatures native to the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ploo II/Legends|Ploo II]]. Windsnakes had red and black heads and despite their name, were not true [[Snake/Legends|snakes]], as they possessed small stubby [[Limb/Legends|legs]]. Windsnakes were a key ingredient in [[Glymph Pie]], despite the fact their [[Poison/Legends|poison]] sacs had to be removed first.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Cestus Deception]]''

|de=Windschlange#legends
